overview: The strongest supportive currents come through Guru and Rahu and Ketu. Pressure points are tied to Shani and need measured handling.
yearlyTheme: For the upcoming Sri Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027), individuals born under Kanya Rashi (Virgo) are poised to enjoy predominantly auspicious results due to the benevolent influence of Jupiter. Until May 31, 2026, life will be marked by comfort, the acquisition of new vehicles, and a heightened social reputation, with women particularly benefiting from gains in gold and jewelry. Your composed nature will foster meaningful connections with intellectuals, while students will exhibit remarkable diligence and farmers achieve their desired yields. The period from June 1 to October 30, 2026, remains exceptionally positive, characterized by robust health and the opportunity to invest self-earned wealth into real estate or housing; furthermore, the progress of elder children will help fulfill long-held aspirations as your personal influence and professional support system grow. Conversely, a cautionary phase arises between October 31, 2026, and January 23, 2027, as Jupiter’s transit may trigger health concerns for children and financial strain due to ostentatious charitable spending. During this interval, youth should exercise moral caution, politicians must navigate public relations with care, and all should avoid speculative ventures or gambling, as progeny-related efforts may not yield results. Fortunately, the tide turns favorably once again from January 24, 2027, ensuring the Telugu year concludes on a successful and prosperous note.

planetaryInfluences.summary: For the upcoming Sri Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027), individuals born under Kanya Rashi (Virgo) are poised to enjoy predominantly auspicious results due to the benevolent influence of Jupiter. Until May 31, 2026, life will be marked by comfort, the acquisition of new vehicles, and a heightened social reputation, with women particularly benefiting from gains in gold and jewelry. Your composed nature will foster meaningful connections with intellectuals, while students will exhibit remarkable diligence and farmers achieve their desired yields. The period from June 1 to October 30, 2026, remains exceptionally positive, characterized by robust health and the opportunity to invest self-earned wealth into real estate or housing; furthermore, the progress of elder children will help fulfill long-held aspirations as your personal influence and professional support system grow. Conversely, a cautionary phase arises between October 31, 2026, and January 23, 2027, as Jupiter’s transit may trigger health concerns for children and financial strain due to ostentatious charitable spending. During this interval, youth should exercise moral caution, politicians must navigate public relations with care, and all should avoid speculative ventures or gambling, as progeny-related efforts may not yield results. Fortunately, the tide turns favorably once again from January 24, 2027, ensuring the Telugu year concludes on a successful and prosperous note.

During the Sri Parabhava Naama year, Kanya Rashi individuals will face predominantly challenging results due to the influence of Saturn. This impact will be particularly pronounced for those whose personal horoscopes lack a strong Jupiter (Guru) influence. Such individuals may encounter unfavorable associations or face social humiliation regarding personal relationships. Significant setbacks or severe health complications for one’s spouse are indicated during this period. Additionally, individuals may suffer from hearing-related ailments and find themselves increasingly dependent on others during travels. It is important to note, however, that Kanya Rashi is not currently under the influence of Elinaati Shani (Sade Sati).

Throughout the Sri Parabhava Naama year, Rahu will bestow highly favorable results for Kanya Rashi individuals across almost all aspects of life, with the singular exception of matters related to progeny. You will achieve significant victories over your rivals and enemies. There will be a focused effort toward enhancing domestic luxury, with new arrangements made for a sophisticated lifestyle. This period also indicates opportunities for foreign travel or international residence. For those considering adoption, this year presents a highly auspicious yoga for adopting a healthy child. However, women should remain vigilant regarding health issues related to the reproductive system. For professionals in the construction and infrastructure sectors, this year is particularly promising, as it brings the likelihood of securing major government contracts.

During the Sri Parabhava Naama year, Ketu will also provide highly favorable outcomes for Kanya Rashi individuals throughout the duration of the transit. You will consistently enjoy the comfort of fine clothing and a sophisticated lifestyle. On the health front, there is a possibility of minor ailments related to the lower abdomen or issues such as hemorrhoids (Piles), which may require attention. Professionally, this is an excellent period for growth, as you will successfully master new business strategies and technical skills. The months of January and February 2027 are particularly noteworthy, as Ketu will bestow significant financial gains and exceptionally beneficial results during this time.

monthlyHighlights.summary: During this month, highly favorable conditions will prevail both at home and within your professional spheres, including business and employment. You can expect a profitable environment and a series of satisfying results across your endeavors. Efforts directed toward the acquisition of a new vehicle are likely to meet with success. However, it is important to avoid procrastination; tasks that have been repeatedly delayed may lead to increased complications if not addressed promptly. Regarding health, please exercise caution between the 16th and 21st of the month, as there are indications of potential food-related illnesses or digestive discomfort.

During this month, your endeavors toward acquiring a new home will prove successful, and any ongoing construction projects will progress smoothly without hindrance. This is also an auspicious period for those seeking to purchase a new vehicle. Financial inflows remain strong, and you will experience significant joy and pride through your children. Professionals can look forward to unexpected yet excellent career opportunities coming their way. A sense of domestic harmony will prevail, creating a pleasant and peaceful home environment. However, exercise caution during the final week; interfering in the personal matters of friends could lead to unnecessary criticism or a loss of reputation. Furthermore, please be vigilant during travels on the 25th, 26th, 27th, and 28th, as there are indications of potential loss due to theft. Taking adequate precautions with your belongings is highly recommended.

During this month, increased family responsibilities may lead to higher physical exertion. On the financial front, making new investments in the share market will prove to be profitable, and you will successfully achieve your financial goals. Professionals will benefit from developing acquaintances with high-ranking officials, which will aid in career advancement. Major projects or tasks that you have undertaken will reach successful completion. Socially, you will be able to distance yourself from deceptive or ill-intentioned friends. Your communication skills and eloquence will be particularly impressive during interactions with others. Children in the family may develop a keen interest in Vedic literature and ancient knowledge. While you will enjoy participating in auspicious family functions, you might face some challenging situations in your personal life. For those in the medical profession, this month brings excellent financial incentives. Farmers can expect gains related to livestock and cattle. Although the 12th and 13th may present minor financial hurdles, your income will significantly improve after the 20th of the month.

This month presents an exceptionally favorable period for those seeking new employment, pursuing career transitions, or making advancements in their professional lives. For newly married couples, this is a highly auspicious time for progeny-related efforts. All forms of business investments are likely to yield significant profits, and overall financial inflows will remain strong throughout this period.

This month, you will initiate significant activities aimed at the welfare and prosperity of your family. Your life path will align with your expectations, leading to the achievement of desired results and an increase in your social standing. During the second week, there are indications of potential disputes with higher authorities; it is advised to handle professional interactions with caution. Be mindful of your personal conduct, as there may be a temporary inclination toward secretive activities or addictive habits. Despite these challenges, your financial income will remain robust. It is not an ideal time to pursue job changes or engage in critical negotiations with superiors during the first half of the month. However, from the third week onwards, new opportunities will gradually emerge. Your strategic thinking will be exceptional, making it difficult for others to anticipate your moves. For the unmarried, matrimonial efforts will prove successful, and long-distance travels related to business will yield positive outcomes. The final week of the month is expected to produce moderate or average results.

This month, you may encounter incidents in your personal life that lead to restlessness and dissatisfaction. Friction with close relatives or loved ones may result in emotional distress. Additionally, the health of your spouse may become a cause for concern, requiring your attention and care. Financially, the income for this month is expected to be average. It is advised to avoid making significant investments in fixed assets, such as land or housing, as the current timing is unfavorable. To maintain self-control and mental balance, you may find solace in pursuing a spiritual path. While you will likely incur expenses toward improving domestic amenities, this is not an ideal time to implement new ideas or projects. Individuals born under Kanya Rashi are encouraged to postpone major decisions during this period. Furthermore, exercise great caution in your speech when interacting with family elders to avoid misunderstandings. Cautionary Dates: Please note that the 14th, 15th, and 18th are particularly unfavorable.

This month continues to present a series of challenging results. Financial earnings may fall short of your expectations, and you may find yourself lacking the necessary time to attend to your personal affairs. The current environment is not conducive to implementing your ideas, and ongoing tasks may face stagnation.

This month promises a return to favorable outcomes. Those seeking employment are likely to receive positive news, and the current period is highly suitable for drafting long-term strategic plans. You will receive full cooperation from those you depend on, and matters related to your professional goals will be encouraging. Your charitable nature will come to the forefront as you contribute financially toward religious or spiritual activities.

During this month, your endeavors will reach completion smoothly and without significant obstacles. You will achieve a definitive victory over your rivals and competitors. In professional spheres—both in employment and business—you will enter into new, highly profitable agreements. Financial earnings will remain consistent with your expectations. However, you may find it necessary to make firm or difficult decisions regarding family matters. For those aspiring for children, this month brings auspicious news.

During this month, there are indications of potential misunderstandings or disputes with siblings regarding ancestral properties or family inheritance. Despite these domestic tensions, your financial income is expected to increase. You are likely to acquire paternal assets, such as land or residential property. This month is particularly favorable for those working in the educational and cultural sectors.

At the beginning of this month, minor health and financial challenges may persist; however, conditions will improve significantly by mid-month. Conflicts and misunderstandings with your spouse will subside, and their renewed cooperation will provide you with a fresh sense of enthusiasm. Professionally, a positive and significant career change is on the horizon. For those who are unmarried, this is an auspicious period that will yield desired matrimonial results. Students will achieve unique recognition at their respective levels of study.

During this month, you will find it necessary to allocate a significant amount of both time and financial resources toward the needs of your family members. You will play a pivotal role in resolving a dispute or conflict related to your spouse; your timely mediation will also ensure that pending funds are recovered on schedule. While business activities are expected to continue at a moderate pace, you will find yourself drawn to spiritual activities to maintain your mental peace and clarity.

During this month, marital bonds will strengthen significantly as long-standing misunderstandings are finally resolved. A deep sense of harmony and mutual understanding will prevail between spouses. Regarding health, elderly individuals born under the Uttara Nakshatra are advised to remain vigilant and prioritize their well-being.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
